text:
None Selected 
Not Tested 
Equivocal 
Negative 
Positive 
Null/missing = n/a (not breast gastro/esophageal cancer); or not reported by OCM participant 
(reference details in the RPTD_TO_RGSTRY codebook entry) 

COMMENT: Practices were required to report clinical and staging data associated with each beneficiary’s assigned 
cancer. HER2 Amplification is routinely tested for breast cancer and gastro/esophageal cancer. It is 
necessary for breast cancer staging and helps determine treatment
